workspaceId.description: Workspace to scope retrieval to. Omit to use the run's workspace.

collectionIds.description: Scope to specific knowledge collections. Inaccessible ids are silently dropped.

candidateLimit.description: Pre-rank candidate pool size; host caps the upper bound.

resultLimit.description: Post-rank returned chunks; host caps the upper bound.

scoreThreshold.description: Host-side minimum relevanceScore (passed through to ctx.knowledge.retrieve).
